# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigValues {
  api_key: string;
  db_url: string;
  feature_flags: {
    enable_new_dashboard: boolean;
    enable_beta_api: boolean;
    enable_dark_mode: boolean;
    maintenance_mode: boolean;
  };
  rate_limit: number;
  cache_ttl: number;
  allowed_origins: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigValues = {
  api_key: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  db_url: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  feature_flags: {
    enable_new_dashboard: false,
    enable_beta_api: false,
    enable_dark_mode: true,
    maintenance_mode: false,
  },
  rate_limit: 100,
  cache_ttl: 3600,
  allowed_origins: ['https://example.com', 'https://app.example.com'],
};

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigValues> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit, cacheTtl, allowedOrigins] =
      await Promise.all([
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('api_key'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('db_url'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfigValues['feature_flags']>('feature_flags'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('rate_limit'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('cache_ttl'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('allowed_origins'),
      ]);

    return {
      api_key: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.api_key,
      db_url: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.db_url,
      feature_flags: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags, ...featureFlags }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags,
      rate_limit: rateLimit ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.rate_limit,
      cache_ttl: cacheTtl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.cache_ttl,
      allowed_origins: allowedOrigins ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.allowed_origins,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config. Falling back to defaults.', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function checkOrigin(request: Request, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  if (!origin) return true;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

function buildCorsHeaders(request: Request, allowedOrigins: string[]): Record<string, string> {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, OPTIONS',
    'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization, X-API-Key',
  };
  if (origin && allowedOrigins.includes(origin)) {
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
  }
  return headers;
}

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const startTime = Date.now();

  const configValues = await getEdgeConfig();

  const corsHeaders = buildCorsHeaders(request, configValues.allowed_origins);

  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, {
      status: 204,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  }

  if (!checkOrigin(request, configValues.allowed_origins)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Origin not allowed' }),
      {
        status: 403,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
      }
    );
  }

  if (configValues.feature_flags.maintenance_mode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service is under maintenance',
        message: 'Please try again later.',
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '300',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const path = url.pathname;

  if (path === '/api/config/health') {
    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'healthy',
        latency_ms: elapsed,
        edge_config_connected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
      }
    );
  }

  if (path === '/api/config/features') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        feature_flags: configValues.feature_flags,
        cache_ttl: configValues.cache_ttl,
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': `public, s-maxage=${configValues.cache_ttl}, stale-while-revalidate=${configValues.cache_ttl * 2}`,
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  const apiKeyHeader = request.headers.get('x-api-key') || request.headers.get('authorization')?.replace('Bearer ', '');

  if (path === '/api/config/protected') {
    if (!apiKeyHeader || apiKeyHeader !== configValues.api_key) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized', message: 'Invalid or missing API key' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: 'Authenticated successfully',
        db_connected: !!configValues.db_url,
        db_host: configValues.db_url
          ? new URL(configValues.db_url).hostname
          : null,
        rate_limit: configValues.rate_limit,
        features_enabled: Object.entries(configValues.feature_flags)
          .filter(([, enabled]) => enabled)
          .map(([name]) => name),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
      }
    );
  }

  if (path === '/api/config' || path === '/api/config/') {
    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;

    const safeConfig = {
      api_key_set: !!configValues.api_key,
      api_key_preview: configValues.api_key
        ? `${configValues.api_key.substring(0, 8)}...`
        : null,
      db_url_set: !!configValues.db_url,
      db_host: configValues.db_url
        ? (() => {
            try {
              return new URL(configValues.db_url).hostname;
            } catch {
              return 'invalid-url';
            }
          })()
        : null,
      feature_flags: configValues.feature_flags,
      rate_limit: configValues.rate_limit,
      cache_ttl: configValues.cache_ttl,
      allowed_origins: configValues.allowed_origins,
      meta: {
        edge_config_connected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
        config_source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge_config' : 'defaults',
        latency_ms: elapsed,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
    };

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(safeConfig, null, 2), {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': `public, s-maxage=${configValues.cache_ttl}, stale-while-revalidate=${configValues.cache_ttl * 2}`,
        'X-Config-Source': process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
        'X-Response-Time': `${elapsed}ms`,
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    });
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not Found',
      available_endpoints: [
        'GET /api/config - View current configuration (safe)',
        'GET /api/config/features - View feature flags',
        'GET /api/config/protected - Authenticated endpoint (requires X-API-Key header)',
        'GET /api/config/health - Health check',
      ],
    }),
    {
      status: 404,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
    }
  );
}
